title: Module 7: APIs & Async JS
description: Internet se data lana aur Asynchronous code.

chapters.title: 1. Asynchronous JavaScript
chapters.content: JavaScript ek time par ek hi kaam karti hai. Par Async code se hum background me kaam kar sakte hain (jaise data download karna).

chapters.title: 2. Promises
chapters.content:
Promise ek wada hai ki future me data aayega.

  • Pending: Kaam chal raha hai.
  • Resolved: Kaam ho gaya.
  • Rejected: Error aa gaya.

chapters.title: 3. Fetch API
chapters.content: Server se data lane ke liye fetch() use hota hai. Ye ek Promise return karta hai.
